{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321124629C10DE50DAEF635C8F960"}"},"total":820},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7535495385273041726","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书女角色很多，不管正派的反派的，作者从她们的立场想法写下她们的故事。一开始我以为主角未来的发展是从商，现在看是从政，作者写的越来越精彩了，必不可少的有立场敌对的女角色，很开心评论里不是冷嘲热讽她们的低道德，简单的给她们贴上绿茶白莲花等标签，更多的是站在她们的立场理解她们的行为。
有人担心cp是原男主，这点可放心，我看到现在文章的发展应该更广一些，随着主角不断接触到的高阶层人物，野心越来越大，将来哪怕有cp，也应该主讲主线事业","text_exts":[{"e":118,"s":115,"text":"白莲花","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%99%BD%E8%8E%B2%E8%8A%B1&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177406838935C8F960%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227535495385273041726%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227499305088184224830%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%99%BD%E8%8E%B2%E8%8A%B1%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1754497454,"group_id":"7499305088184224830","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6gQ3f4HQpG2O85r1mdoZscXOoemTSUm79a0ArZ+UR/r","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"3421285063066995","user_name":"用户34212850"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3421285063066995","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1771554807,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"活动专属","bg_color":"#E5FAF9","can_worn":false,"id":25,"name":"游戏入侵","small_url":"http://p6-novel.byteimg.com/novel-static/3ffa7b78adea11578ffcd90f16b6e61e~tplv-noop.image","sticker_type":2,"url":"http://p6-novel.byteimg.com/novel-static/3ffa7b78adea11578ffcd90f16b6e61e~tplv-noop.image"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7499305088184224830","book_info":{"abstract":"作品标签：穿越+傲慢与偏见+简·爱+西方名著+公版衍生+女配+日常（别名：乡绅小姐的封爵路）

意外坠入《傲慢与偏见》与《简爱》交织的西方名著世界，夏洛特成了那位为生计嫁给柯林斯的女配角夏洛特·卢卡斯。

　在这个“没有财产的淑女，婚姻是唯一的体面出路”的世界，夏洛却不想将自己的未来，寄托在一个男人身上。
　
    从端茶倒水的王室女仆，到手握权柄的贴身女管家，靠着智谋受封女伯爵……达西、罗切斯特？在绝对权势面前都是背景板！

一句话简介：无CP纯爽文，看炮灰女配凭实力逆袭，走出独属于自己的权倾之路！（之前一直没有贴有无CP标签，现在贴上，女主夏洛特无官配）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d79027fc462a780a510ea24471c63ffe","author":"蜀中说书人","author_id":"","book_id":"7499305088184224830","book_name":"综西方名著：我的朋友叫简爱","book_short_name":"摄政女伯爵","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201010","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"9790人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1015,"name":"女频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1015&name=女频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":463,"name":"今穿古","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=463&name=今穿古&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1037,"name":"公版衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1037&name=公版衍生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7499305203825394238","read_count":"9790","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1028192"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"469","tags":"女频衍生,穿越,今穿古,魂穿,公版衍生,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/56bcd2f1128bf698e153edae79c740b8~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779252389&x-signature=jvn619IMyQajbRxjLjiRv4Yp9bA%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1192345363551678","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"78"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321124629C10DE50DAEF635C8F960"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读7小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":63,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":24775,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":23602},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7581272171650450201","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很厉害的文。原来根据题目以为是西方版农女种田逆袭一路开挂打脸爽文，看了一段时间发现不是，虽然还是挺爽的，但不是无脑爽。看了一半以为是女主建立自己商业帝国，其实也不是，女主想要参政权，所以又变成了权谋文。全程无拉踩，无莫名其妙的恶毒女配和发qing男配，女主踏踏实实的谋得自己的权利，逐渐身边聚拢了很多有共同目标的人。属于是有逻辑有剧情但是不沉重的好文了！","text_exts":[{"e":100,"s":97,"text":"权谋文","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%9D%83%E8%B0%8B%E6%96%87&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177406838935C8F960%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227581272171650450201%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227499305088184224830%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%9D%83%E8%B0%8B%E6%96%87%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":117,"s":113,"text":"恶毒女配","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%81%B6%E6%AF%92%E5%A5%B3%E9%85%8D&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177406838935C8F960%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227581272171650450201%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227499305088184224830%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%81%B6%E6%AF%92%E5%A5%B3%E9%85%8D%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1765156135,"group_id":"7499305088184224830","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"看书1w+小时，不定时推好书","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyM8d8Zr659bZADSl5HYF/
